prompt:
Create a clean black-line-art medical instruction illustration in the universal patient-information-leaflet style: uniform medium-weight black ink lines on pure white background, minimal short parallel hatching only for soft shadow / volume on hands and curved surfaces, no color except red blood inside a vial in the left state, no frame, no border, no captions, no labels other than the embossed text on the tube, no logos, no numbers, no other accent elements.

=== COMPOSITION ===
A 1:1 square DUAL-STATE composition, arranged side-by-side. LEFT STATE on the left half of the frame, a curved black ARROW pointing right in the middle, RIGHT STATE on the right half.

=== THE PROTECTOR TUBE — LOCKED ANCHOR ===
The protector tube in BOTH states must be a faithful line-art reproduction of the protector tube shown in the FIRST provided reference image (the approved standalone tube illustration). Match it EXACTLY: same stubby pill-bottle proportions, same wide diameter, same short squat black cap, same slightly-taller white body, same DIALED embossed on the cap (first D at the TOP of the cap, last D at the bottom — letters running top-down along the cap's vertical axis with each letter rotated 90° book-spine style), same HEALTH embossed on the body (first H at the TOP of the body, last H at the bottom — same book-spine sideways letter orientation), same line weight, same outlined embossed letter style (thin white outlines on the black cap, thin black outlines on the white body).

The DIALED and HEALTH text must read FORWARD top-down on the assembled tube, with the first letter of each word at the top of its section. Both words use the SAME letter rotation direction (same head-tilt to read).

=== LEFT STATE ===
The upright WHITE PROTECTOR TUBE BODY by itself (no cap yet) — same body as in the FIRST reference, with HEALTH embossed in the correct orientation (first H at the top of the body just below the open mouth, last H at the bottom near the base). The body's open mouth at the top is exposed (no cap). A hand from the UPPER-LEFT of the frame holds a tall narrow capped blood-filled GLASS VIAL — transparent tube partially filled with RED BLOOD (about 70% full), plain ribbed black-line-art cap on top of the vial — and lowers the vial DOWN into the body's open mouth. The vial's lower portion sits inside the body's open mouth; the upper portion (with ribbed cap) extends above. The vial is the only colored element (red blood inside).

=== MIDDLE: ARROW ===
A SOLID BLACK CURVED ARROW arching from left to right across the center of the composition, pointing toward the right state. Indicates the next step.

=== RIGHT STATE ===
The ASSEMBLED upright protector tube — same WHITE BODY as the LEFT state (same proportions, same HEALTH text in the same correct orientation, first H at top, last H at bottom). On TOP of the body sits the BLACK PROTECTOR CAP from the FIRST reference (short squat solid-black cylinder, cap height ≈ 0.5x its diameter, same wide diameter as the body) with DIALED embossed along its vertical axis, first D at the top of the cap, last D at the bottom, letters in the SAME book-spine rotation as the HEALTH letters on the body. A hand from the UPPER-RIGHT of the frame pinches the cap between thumb and fingers and lowers it onto the body. The blood-filled vial is now seated INSIDE the body — visible faintly through the body's open mouth as a hint of red just below the cap (the vial's top with its ribbed cap may peek out a tiny bit between the cap and body, or be entirely hidden under the placed cap).

Reading top-down on the assembled tube (right state): BLACK CAP showing DIALED forward (D-I-A-L-E-D) → WHITE BODY showing HEALTH forward (H-E-A-L-T-H) = 'DIALED HEALTH' linearly top-down.

=== STYLE ===
Uniform medium-weight black ink line work on pure white background. Minimal short parallel hatching only for soft shadow / volume on hands and curved cylindrical surfaces. The only color in the entire composition is the RED BLOOD inside the vial in the left state. 1:1 square composition. Both states sit roughly at the same vertical position with the arrow centered between them. Generous clean white margins around the composition. Drawn-by-hand line work, clean and crisp.

No frame, no border, no caption, no labels beyond the embossed DIALED on the cap and HEALTH on the body, no logos, no numbers, no other accent objects.
